statement: In every magma, Equation 1823 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * w) * z)`) implies Equation 1712 (`x = (y * x) * ((z * z) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0843
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w w) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op z z) w))
